en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: ’inavayan mapiya! i sinsi harem mu uri panaanadam kanta na akanen nanta piningaiyan na pinuyumayan mu kemuda ta marengay.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的卑南語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Pinuyumayan language for food.

ab: sayhu u kinger za tu ngai ni sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, ma’ulid ku. karuwa u ziya marengay parasan?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: alra na’u kani! iturusi ku miyup parasan.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ch: A:請把你們的課本拿出來。
en: A: Please take out your textbooks.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pens.

ab: sinsi, malalup ku mada za tratruli.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ch: A:請把你們的橡皮擦拿出來。
en: A: Please take out your erasers.

ab: sinsi, malalup ku mada za aivas.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Let’s take a break after class.

ab: ta palruwanay kani, zi nu masalr na liyusan marepana’uwa ta lra.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
